hooks.command: tree -I 'node_modules|.git|.next|dist|__pycache__|file-tree.md' > file-tree.md && for f in $(find . -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -not -path '*/.git/*' \( -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.js' -o -name '*.py' -o -name '*.swift' -o -name '*.m' -o -name '*.h' \) 2>/dev/null); do count=$(grep -cE 'export |^function |^const .* => |^class |^def |func |@objc |^@interface |^@implementation |^@protocol |- \(|^\+ \('
echo 'Save the approved plan to the Plans/ directory now, then ask which phase to begin.'

input=$(cat); echo "$input" | grep -qE 'rm -rf|git push.*(main|master)' && echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Forbidden action detected: matches rm -rf or push to protected branch"}' && exit 2 || exit 0
echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.env$|\.env\..*|credentials|secrets' && echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Attempt to write to sensitive file blocked"}' && exit 2 || exit 0
